lines.text: We... dumped him in the Tacet Discord zone overnight. We'll claim he was killed by those monsters tomorrow morning.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Sir... are you sure? Are we really going to work with the Order... after they made you kill one of our own?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Unbelievable. What is Capollo even thinking? Killing one of our own... It's a complete betrayal of our family! I must record all this madness with something...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: My Terminal? No, it's too risky. Wait... I have Benett's body... Nobody's going to pay attention to a dead man's Terminal.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I'll record it, then overwrite with new data.... I have to keep this record well... In case I also...
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
